title: Annual Statutory Tax & Compliance Master Guide FY 2024-25
description: A comprehensive reference handbook covering key income tax statutory deadlines, TDS deduction rate charts, GST return schedules, MCA annual compliance timelines, and Section 43B(h) payment rules.
author: CA Saatvik Gupta

title: MSME Financial Structuring & Statutory Credit Schemes Whitepaper
description: An exhaustive analysis of government credit guarantee schemes (CGTMSE), Udyam registration benefits, interest subvention programs, and Section 43B(h) compliance management for small and medium enterprises.
author: CA Saatvik Gupta

title: GST E-Invoicing & Input Tax Credit (GSTR-2B) Audit Playbook
description: A practitioner's guide to managing Rule 48(4) e-invoicing compliance, setting up vendor GSTR-2B reconciliation systems, and handling GST departmental audit notices under Section 65.
author: CA Saatvik Gupta
